item.name: Get Payment Details by Order ID

request.description: Retrieve comprehensive payment information for a specific order including stored payment details and live Stripe data
Process a full refund for an order. Requires payment admin permissions.
Admin utility to fix orders missing payment intent IDs by retrieving them from Stripe sessions. Set dryRun to false to apply fixes.

Test email templates to ensure they render correctly and don't show 'This email requires an HTML-enabled client' message. Options: 'all', 'refund-confirmation', 'order-confirmed-new', 'payment-failed'
